name: NextFeed
description: Offline-friendly RSS and Atom reader for NextUI devices.
author: Eric Reinsmidt

changelog.v1.0.0: WiFi check before fetch with retry/continue, refresh all feeds, scroll bounce fix, new logo and splash screen.
changelog.v0.3.0: PakKit UI integration, custom on-screen keyboard with URL shortcuts, removed color settings, minimal text hints.
changelog.v0.2.0: Added caching of raw XML per feed, auto-refresh on launch, article count shown next to feed names, color picker and more.
changelog.v0.1.0: RSS 2.0 and Atom feed parsing, using Apostrophe for native NextUI look.
